First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. jobs.jobs_info: IGCAR Apprentice Vacancy 2026: The Indira Gandhi Centre for Atomic Research (IGCAR), Kalpakkam, has released the official notification for the Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026. This recruitment drive will open a total of 175 trade apprentice positions, offering a one-year apprenticeship. Online applications will open on July 20, 2026, and will be accepted until August 19, 2026. Selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹10,560 to ₹11,040 per month, depending on the trade. Applications will be accepted online only, and candidates must first register on the Apprenticeship India Portal.

After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.title: Charkhi Dadri Safai Karamchari Recruitment 2026, Notification Out
jobs.how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below. Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.). Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview. Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.” Submit the application at Block Development and Panchayat Officer Office, Boand Kala, District Charkhi Dadri during office hours.

vacancy_details.eligibility: 10th passThe applicant must be a resident of the village in question.If a qualified candidate from the village is not available, a qualified person from a nearby village may also be considered.The candidate must be physically fit and capable of performing sanitation work.

jobs.title: ESIC Laboratory Technician Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Rs. Rs.20,000/- per month + HRA as admissible
selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Interview.
Date, time, and venue will be notified on the ESIC website and by email.
jobs.how_to_apply: Notification padhein: Sabse pehle official notification PDF download karke poori tarah padh lein taaki eligibility aur requirements clearly samajh aa jaayein. Resume/Bio-Data taiyar karein: Apna updated Bio-Data/resume banayein jisme educational qualification, experience (agar ho), aur personal details clearly likhi hon. Documents attach karein: Apne educational certificates, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN), aur experience letters (agar applicable ho) ki self-attested scanned copies PDF format me ready rakhein. Subject line sahi likhein: Email ka subject line clear rakhein — jaise “Application for the post of …………”. Email bhejein: Apna Bio-Data aur documents email ke through mruesicfbd@gmail.com. par bhejein. Confirmation ka wait karein: Shortlisted candidates ko interview/written test ki information email ke through hi bheji jaayegi.

After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. jobs.title: HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainee Vacancy 2026, Check How to Apply
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Selected Graduate Apprentice Trainees will receive a total stipend of ₹25,000 per month.
selection_process: Acceptance of the Apprenticeship Agreement on the NATS Portal
jobs.how_to_apply: Go to the HPCL Career Portal. Create a login by registering for a new account. After logging in, select the Engineering Branch. Fill in your personal and educational information. Select your Training State. Upload your photo and signature. Check your application preview carefully. Final Submit. Keep your application number safe.
jobs.jobs_info: HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainee Vacancy 2026: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has released a notification for the Graduate Apprentice Trainee (Engineering) recruitment for the year 2026-27. This recruitment drive offers 358 training slots in various states across the country. Eligible candidates can apply online from July 15, 2026, to July 31, 2026. Selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹25,000 per month during the one-year apprenticeship.

jobs.title: Jal Shakti Vibhag Dharampur Circle Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Para Pump Operator – ₹7,100 per month Para Fitter – ₹7,100 per month Multipurpose Worker – ₹6,000 per month
jobs.how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or use the link below. Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.). Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview. Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.” To apply, candidates have to fill the prescribed application form and submit it along with the required documents to the office of Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division, Dharampur, District Solan (Himachal Pradesh) by post or in person.
jobs.jobs_info: Jal Shakti Vibhag Dharampur Circle Vacancy 2026: The Jal Shakti Department, Himachal Pradesh, has issued a recruitment notice for 30 Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker positions. Offline applications are invited for this recruitment. The deadline for submission is July 30, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a monthly honorarium ranging from ₹6,000 to ₹7,100, depending on the position. Recruitment will be on a part-time basis, and selected candidates will be required to work six hours per day.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade of ITI Electrician/Wireman/Diesel Mechanic/Pump Mechanic/Motor Mechanic/Pump Operator cum Mechanic from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade mentioned above/Income Certificate under Skill Development Scheme of Government and Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe

Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) and ITI Certificate in the trade of Fitter & Plumber from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th)/Income Certificate along with Certificate in the above-mentioned trade under Skill Development Scheme of Government, and Candidates who belong to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

Candidate must have a minimum qualification of Middle Pass or equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government/Income Certificate, and candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

jobs.title: Janmitra Udyog LLP Work From Home Vacancy 2026, Apply Online
jobs.how_to_apply: आधिकारिक पोर्टल पर जाएं। रजिस्ट्रेशन करें। अपनी जानकारी भरें। उपलब्ध अवसर देखें। इच्छित कार्य के लिए आवेदन करें।
jobs.jobs_info: Janmitra Udyog LLP Work From Home Vacancy 2026: Mukhyamantri Work From Home Yojana 2026 के तहत जयपुर जिले की Janmitra Udyog LLP संस्था द्वारा Digital Shop Operator (Sanchalika) पदों के लिए भर्ती निकाली गई है। इस अवसर के तहत कुल 240 पदों पर महिलाओं को घर बैठे या डिजिटल माध्यम से कार्य करने का मौका दिया जाएगा। इस पद के लिए न्यूनतम शैक्षणिक योग्यता 10th पास निर्धारित की गई है। आवेदन करने के लिए किसी पूर्व अनुभव की आवश्यकता नहीं है। इच्छुक महिला उम्मीदवार 30-12-2026 तक ऑनलाइन आवेदन कर सकती हैं

jobs.title: ICAR-NRCE Hisar Young Professional Recruitment 2026, Application Started
jobs.how_to_apply: Notification padhein: Sabse pehle official notification PDF download karke poori tarah padh lein taaki eligibility aur requirements clearly samajh aa jaayein. Resume/Bio-Data taiyar karein: Apna updated Bio-Data/resume banayein jisme educational qualification, experience (agar ho), aur personal details clearly likhi hon. Documents attach karein: Apne educational certificates, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN), aur experience letters (agar applicable ho) ki self-attested scanned copies PDF format me ready rakhein. Subject line sahi likhein: Email ka subject line clear rakhein — jaise “Application for the post of …………”. Email bhejein: Apna Bio-Data aur documents email ke through recruitment.nrce@gmail.com par bhejein. Confirmation ka wait karein: Shortlisted candidates ko interview/written test ki information email ke through hi bheji jaayegi.

jobs.jobs_info: MNSS Rai Clerk Steno Vacancy 2026: Motilal Nehru School of Sports (MNSS), Rai, Sonipat, run under the Haryana Government, has invited online applications for recruitment to a total of 3 regular posts of Clerk and Steno-Typist. Detailed eligibility, age limit, selection process, and other rules for this recruitment will be applicable as per the detailed advertisement available on the official website of the school.

jobs.title: PM Shri JNV Sirsa Recruitment 2026, Check Eligibility & How to Apply
jobs.how_to_apply: Before attending the interview, please read the official notification carefully. Candidates must report to the venue at the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Bring a set of self-attested photocopies along with all original documents, such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificates (if applicable). If required, bring the completed application form. Verify the eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete the registration formalities. If required, bring an extra passport-sized photograph to submit. Form Download: Visit the official website or use the link below to download it.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Minimum 50% marks in M.Com (Commerce) from a recognized university. Candidates with an M.Com in Applied/Business Economics will not be eligible for this position. B.Ed. A degree from a recognized institute.

jobs.title: Bank of Baroda Churu Attender Vacancy Form 2026, Apply Now
jobs.how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully. Prepare the application on plain paper or use the prescribed format. Fill in all the required information correctly. Attach self-attested copies of the required documents. Must superscribe the envelope with “Application for the Post of Attender at BSVS at RSETI Churu on Contractual Basis.” Send the application to The Director, Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan, RSETI Churu, Khasra No. 271, Sector-1, Near Roadways Bus Stand, Sainik Basti, Churu – 331001 (Rajasthan) by 5:00 PM on July 20, 2026.
jobs.jobs_info: Bank of Baroda Churu Attender Vacancy Form 2026: If you’ve passed 10th grade and are looking for a job in a bank-related organization, this is a good opportunity for you. Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan (BSVS), Churu, a RSETI institute sponsored by Bank of Baroda, has released a notification for the post of Attender on a contractual basis. A total of 01 position will be filled under this recruitment. Interested candidates can submit applications offline until July 20, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a starting salary of ₹14,000 per month, which can reach up to ₹19,000 per month with annual increases. If you meet the eligibility criteria, please apply before the deadline.

jobs.jobs_info: NIT Kurukshetra Vacancy 2026: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Kurukshetra has released a major recruitment notification for youth preparing to make a career in the field of research and higher education. Eligible candidates will be selected for a total of 19 posts of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). The application process for this recruitment is completely online, and candidates can apply till 31 July 2026 at 11:59 pm. Selected candidates will get ₹37,000 per month along with HRA. This recruitment will be done on a contract basis under the ANRF PAIR SAKSHAM Project.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Post-graduation in Basic Sciences/ Engineering/ Management/ Technology with 60% aggregate marks/ Average (CGPA) 6.5 on a 10-point scale for GEN, relaxed by 5% or CGPA 0.5 for SC/ ST/ PwD from UGC recognized University/ Institute/ Autonomous bodies. Final year Master’s applicants may apply if results are submitted by 31-08-2026.
